scheme_data.scheme_name: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP)
scheme_data.description: The Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps keep families safe and healthy through initiatives that assist families with energy costs.
scheme_data.benefit: Assistance with home energy bills, energy crises, weatherization, and minor energy-related home repairs.
scheme_data.application_process: For information on how to apply for energy assistance, please visit Energyhelp.us.
